issue_description: Product description is entirely missing in the source dataset.
analytical_impact: No impact on KPI analysis because product name, category, and department are available.
Limits postal-code analysis; market, region, country, state, and city remain usable.
proposed_treatment: Do not impute; exclude postal-code-level analysis.

issue_description: Sensitive customer fields are present in raw data.
analytical_impact: Not needed for portfolio analytics and inappropriate for published processed data.
Duplicate full rows would inflate item-level metrics if present.
proposed_treatment: Retain records unless duplicates are found; investigate if nonzero.

analytical_impact: Duplicate item keys would invalidate order-item grain.
proposed_treatment: Validate uniqueness and stop if duplicates affect grain.
applied_treatment: Validated during pipeline; no deletion applied.

issue_description: Order identifier repeats because the main dataset is order-item grain.
analytical_impact: Order-level KPIs require distinct-order logic to avoid double counting.
proposed_treatment: Calculate delivery and cancellation KPIs at order grain.
applied_treatment: Order-level helper table created for KPIs.

issue_description: Negative profit values indicate loss-making transactions.
analytical_impact: Represents valid business losses; not a data error.
proposed_treatment: Retain and analyze as profitability risk.

issue_description: Shipping date occurs before order date.
analytical_impact: Impossible date relationship would distort shipping duration KPIs.
applied_treatment: Checked; records retained only if valid.

issue_description: Late delivery flag disagrees with positive shipping delay.
proposed_treatment: Use source late flag for headline late-rate, keep delay days as operational duration.
applied_treatment: Documented source semantic mismatch if any.

analytical_impact: Invalid discount rates could distort net sales checks.
proposed_treatment: Flag and exclude invalid discount-rate interpretation if present.

analytical_impact: Would affect revenue and margin calculations.
proposed_treatment: Flag and investigate; retain if source business status supports it.

issue_description: Missing parsed order or shipping dates.
analytical_impact: Would block time-series and shipping-duration analysis.
proposed_treatment: Parse source date fields and flag failures.
